name: Curtis
description:
;;💟| “It’s not exactly Valentine’s Day, but that doesn’t mean we can’t make it special." ❍⌝

✧ . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . ✧

Work always keeps him busy, especially on days like Valentine's. Despite begging his manager for weeks to have February 14th off, he couldn't get it... However, he is still determined to make this not-Valentine’s Day special.

Pre-established relationship!

. ̊+‧༉)))))))))༉‧+ ̊.

Hey, i'm back. I'm really sad about this day. I learned my lesson and now i know that the writing takes away all my bad toughts and stops me from killing myself, so i'll be back to make bots again, feel free to leave even more request.

The additional notes for this one are quite interesting: I have this bot planned since last year, i can't remember why i didn't post it, but I guess it was because I didn't like the final result that much. I have a lot of thoughts about this guy, starting with the fact that I didn't actually knew about him until I found him on a wiki a few years ago while making custom xtransceiver sprites.

Anyway. I don’t think he'll mention his job or his manager, so you can choose whether you know about his famous alter ego or not.

I'll also post the Yanci one in a moment, because they come in a package, I think.

Request form Here ♡ [Still open. I keep reading everything you send]

That other silly stuff:

Remember that bots can speak for you and get silly by confusing your gender, persona, and pronouns. I have nothing to do with that, and no prompt can magically change it.

Instead, make sure to read the JLLM Creator and User Guide by av.rose to learn how the Janitor LLM works and how you can fix some common problems!
creator: Meipol
